{{Quote|Anyway, Ninora Birt escorted a shuttle out to ''Lusankya''{{'s}} repair station. She said that repairs weren't going well.|[[Diss Ti'wyn]] on Ninora Birt|<ref name="Rebel Stand" />}}
'''Ninora Birt''' was a former freelance [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and owner of the ''[[Record Time]]''. She joined the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], serving in the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]] as the captain of the ''Record Time'' and later as a pilot in [[Blackmoon Squadron]] under [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] with the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]].
